package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_rows_scan_into_map_per_row: Layer: Database access. Flag row scans into map[string]any where typed structs or column slices would reduce allocation.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule526NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario526Negative(records []Rule526NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
